GLOBAL EXTENSION CONTROL Code Setup PAGEREF _Toc47093527 \h 1 1.1 Enablement System Code PAGEREF _Toc47093528 \h 1 2. ADD C-000-EX05 CODE ID TO C-000 GLOBAL CODE 6 2.1 C-000-EX05 Enablement 6 3. ADD EX05 TRANSACTION PARAMETERS 8 3.1 Pull ilpn List transaction paramaters 8 3.2 pack ilpn from case pick transaction paramaters 9 3.3 fill pick location transaction paramaters 10 4. Clear Cach e 1 0 1 . GLOBAL EXTENSION CONTROL Code Setup Enablement System Code Navigate to the System Codes (Configuration) UI. If system code C- 000 ( Global Extens ion Control ) does not yet exist, click Add. Populate the followin g information: 232410 174433 Note: The checkbox “System code parameters exist” will auto populate upon completion of subsequent steps for adding parameters, and it is uneditable to the user. Click Save. Next, click the Code ID’s Action Button The System Code ID’s screen is displayed. 2343785 9036050 Page 3 of = NUMPAGES 13 13 0 0 Page 3 of = NUMPAGES 13 13 right 353276 0 0 Click ADD. Populate the following information provided above. Click SAVE to save the Code ID. Next, Click the Parameters Action button located on the bottom right of the screen to Navigate back to System Code Parameters screen. System Code Parameters Screen is displayed. Click ADD button. 344805 151933 Populate the following information provided above. Click SAVE. 2343785 9036050 Page 4 of = NUMPAGES 13 13 0 0 Page 4 of = NUMPAGES 13 13 Click on the Parameters tab 189290 417782 check the box to enable all custom functionality. Click SAVE. 2343785 9036050 Page 5 of = NUMPAGES 13 13 0 0 Page 5 of = NUMPAGES 13 13 2. ADD C-0 0 0-EX0 5 CODE ID TO C- 000 G LO BAL CODE (Note: if EX05 has been previously configured, this system code will already be in the environment) 138023 631981 Navigate to System Codes UI in WM. We will need to add Custom code C- 000 - EX0 5 if it has not been added. Search for system code C - 000 : Use the Custom Code drop-down option under the Record Type menu. Type in 000 for Code Type. Click apply to search. Click the Checkbox to select the system code. Click on the Code ID's action button in the lower right of the menu. Click ADD action button. Populate the fields with the information provided in the screenshot above . Click SAVE. 2343785 9036050 Page 6 of = NUMPAGES 13 13 0 0 Page 6 of = NUMPAGES 13 13 2.1 C- 000 - EX0 5 Enablement Click the Blue Parameters Tab. Located next to the DETAILS tab. Check the box to enable all custom functionality. CLICK SAVE. 2343785 9036050 Page 7 of = NUMPAGES 13 13 0 0 Page 7 of = NUMPAGES 13 13 3 . ADD EX05 TRANSACTION PARAMETERS (Note: if EX05 has already been configured, these transaction parameters will already be set in the environment) 3 .1 Pull ilpn List transaction paramaters Navigate to Transaction Parameters UI Search for Transaction PULL ILPN - CASES where EX05 functionality is to be utilized , select transaction select Program Template Only applicable for cutdowns from reserves Select Add and enter the below information in the fields Click Transaction Parameters in the bottom right, re-select your transaction, select the parameters tab , click Edit Scroll to the bottom of the parameters, enable the check box next to parameter 501-501, click Save 3 .2 pack ilpn from case pick transaction paramaters Navigate to Transaction Parameters UI Search for Transaction PCK ILPN FROM CASE PICK where EX05 functionality is to be utilized , select transaction select Program Template Select Add and enter the below information in the fields Click Transaction Parameters in the bottom right, re-select your transaction, select the parameters tab, click Edit Scroll to the bottom of the parameters, enable the check box next to parameter 501-501, click Save 3 .3 fill pick location transaction paramaters Navigate to Transaction Parameters UI Search for Transaction FILL PICK LOCATION (Fill Actv / Fill Case Pick) where EX05 functionality is to be utilized Select Add and enter the below information in the fields Click Transaction Parameters in the bottom right, re-select your transaction, select the parameters tab, click Edit Scroll to the bottom of the parameters, enable the check box next to parameter 501-501, click Save 2343785 9036050 Page 12 of = NUMPAGES 13 13 0 0 Page 12 of = NUMPAGES 13 13 4 . Clear Cache Navigate to Cache Administration UI. right 209673 Click ‘Clear All’ 2343785 9036050 Page 13 of = NUMPAGES 13 13 0 0 Page 13 of = NUMPAGES 13 13
